home.pageTitle: alviKRON — ALVINA Creator Economy KRON Family Memecoin | Fair Launch on Base
home.eyebrow: KRON Family · Phase II Satellite · ALVINA & Creator Economy · Base Network
home.subtitle: The creator-economy meme lane for builders, culture makers, and ALVINA-inspired digital chaos.
home.lead: alviKRON is the ALVINA and creator-economy themed KRON Family memecoin — an experimental culture asset for creators, storytellers, and community builders. Fair launch only. Not investment promises.
home.warning: alviKRON is a high-risk experimental memecoin. No guaranteed price, liquidity, listing, utility, creator income, or returns. Informational only — not financial advice.
home.statusTitle: alviKRON · Phase II · Queued for Fair Launch
home.statusDesc: Contract addresses publish on this site after fair-launch deployment on Base. Primary KRON gateway: www.ekron.network.
home.aboutDesc1: alviKRON is a separate KRON Family memecoin inspired by ALVINA and creator-economy culture. It does not represent equity, revenue share, platform rights, or guaranteed access to any ALVINA system.
home.aboutDesc2: A playful, speculative culture asset for AI creators, digital personalities, content automation, and community-driven creator-economy narratives. Meme first — utility later, without promise.
home.launchTitle: Two rails. One rule for memes.
home.launchDesc: Infrastructure tokens fund product via structured raises. KRON Family memecoins launch fair — always. alviKRON follows the same standard as eKRON.
home.railInfraDesc: Sovereign infrastructure, AI, and ecosystem layers. Presales fund labs, protocol work, and serious development.
home.railCultureDesc: All 7 KRON tokens: no presale, no private sale, on-chain locks, standard 80/10/5/5 tokenomics. Culture builds community.
home.tokenDesc: Descriptive information. May evolve with deployment, verification, liquidity, and legal documentation.
home.tokenAntiDump: Anti-dump: 14-day notice before locked allocation sales · max 10% per event. Full address registry · Fair Launch Standard
home.onchainDesc: Contract and allocation wallets for alviKRON on Base. Addresses publish here after deployment. Copy addresses only from this page.
home.familyDesc: Staggered rollout — eKRON gateway first, themed satellites including alviKRON, then demand-gated spin-offs. Never presale. Never a bundled family sale.
home.progDesc: The KRON Fair Launch Program is open-source Solidity on Base. Deploy any KRON Family token with standard 80/10/5/5 distribution and immutable timelocks — no presale logic, ever.
home.progOpenDesc: All smart contracts and launch tooling are published in the Launch Program. Review audits, tokenomics, and deployment steps on the dedicated program page.
home.principlesTitle: Creator meme culture with public clarity.
home.riskDesc: alviKRON is experimental, speculative, and risky. No utility, market, liquidity, listing, creator income, or recoverable value is guaranteed.

faq.a1: No. alviKRON and all KRON Family memecoins follow the KRON Fair Launch Standard — no presale and no private sale, ever. Infrastructure tokens (ENK, SOVRA, ENM) may use structured raises; memecoins do not.
faq.a2: Seven independent experimental memecoins sharing a brand universe: eKRON, soviKRON, mineKRON, alviKRON, puriKRON, puppyKRON, and warpKRON. Each has its own contract and risk profile. Primary gateway: www.ekron.network. See the full roster.
faq.q3: Is alviKRON the same as ALVINA?
faq.a3: No. alviKRON is a memecoin inspired by ALVINA and creator-economy culture. ALVINA is a separate AI persona and product ecosystem. Names are connected by brand — they are not the same asset, equity, or revenue share.
faq.a4: Every KRON memecoin: 10B fixed supply, 80% fair-launch LP, 10% ecosystem (12-month lock), 5% founder (6-month lock), 5% founder (12-month lock). Enforced by on-chain timelocks via the launch program.
faq.q5: How do I verify the official contract?
faq.a5: Only trust addresses on the official verification page and announcements from official domains (alvikron.com). If it is not verified there, assume it is not official.
faq.a6: alviKRON is a Phase II satellite, queued for staggered fair launch after eKRON credibility. No timeline guarantees. Contract addresses remain TBD until deployment.
faq.a7: alviKRON will deploy on Base (EVM), chain ID 8453, using the same fair-launch program as eKRON. Always confirm you are on Base before interacting.
faq.q8: What is the official alviKRON contract address?
faq.a8: The official contract is TBD — queued for deployment. It will be published on the verification page after fair launch. Do not trust any other address.
faq.q9: How do I contact the alviKRON team?
faq.a9: Official project email: team@alvikron.com. Only trust communications from official domains (alvikron.com) and verified channels.
faq.q10: Is alviKRON financial advice or an investment?
faq.a10: No. alviKRON is an experimental memecoin for culture and community. This website is informational only — not financial, legal, or tax advice. You may lose all funds. DYOR.

consent.title: Legal Notice & Cookie Consent
consent.intro: alviKRON is a high-risk experimental memecoin. This website is informational only — not financial, legal, or tax advice. You must accept all policies below to access the homepage.
consent.cookiesDesc: We use essential functional storage (language preference, consent record). No advertising or third-party tracking cookies are deployed by this site.
consent.policiesDesc: By clicking Accept, you agree to all of the following:
consent.responsibilityDesc: You confirm that you understand alviKRON may lose all value, that you alone verify contract addresses and transactions, that you accept full responsibility for wallet security, and that you comply with all applicable laws and taxes in your jurisdiction.
consent.warning: Warning: Memecoins are extremely volatile. You can lose all funds. No guaranteed price, liquidity, listing, or returns.
consent.declineNote: You must accept to view the alviKRON homepage. Official (binding) legal language: English.
